inputs.text: Maine bahut tezi se bukhar mahsoos kiya, sir mein bahut dard hai

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Acute onset fever and headache are common in Chikungunya

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever can also present with sudden high fever and headache

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Dengue is also a possibility but less likely without other symptoms

inputs.text: Ab aankhon ke peeche dard ho raha hai, haddiyan toot rahi hain, mujhe bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Retro-orbital pain and bone pain are characteristic of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Chikungunya can also cause joint pain but retro-orbital pain is less common

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever is less likely with these specific symptoms

inputs.text: Ab mere bukhar mein kami aa rahi hai, lal daane nikal rahe hain, masoodon se khoon aa raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Fever drop, rash, and bleeding gums are cardinal signs of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever is unlikely with these specific symptoms

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria is less likely without other symptoms like chills and rigors

inputs.text: Ab mujhe bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai, lal daane abhi bhi hain, mujhe dar hai ki ye hemorrhagic ho jaye

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Prolonged weakness, rash, and petechiae confirm Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to specific symptoms and signs of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to lack of other symptoms like chills and rigors
